APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-24-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Setting Aside Entry Default And Dismissing Action; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declarations Of Bojan Stoyanov, Assia Stoyanova, Andrew Smith And David Krause-Leemon In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jun-17-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Alexandra Darling, Esq., GAVRILOV & BROOKS 2315 Capitol Avenue Sacramento, CA 95816 Telephone: (916) 504-0529 Facsimile: (916) 727-6877 Email: ognian@gavrilovlaw.com Email: ecohen@gavrilovlaw.com Email: adarling@gavrilovlaw.com Attorneys for Plaintiffs, HRISTO GYOSHEV and STANISLAV GYOSHEVfor Plaintiff.
David R. Krause-Leemon, Esq., KRAUSE-LEEMON COHEN & DANESHRAD LLP 818.922-2424 david@klcdlaw.com Attorneys for Specially Appearing Defendants ASSIA STOYANOVA and BOJAN STOYANOV

Matter was not properly contested by plaintiff's counsel. Plaintiff indicates to the Court that pursuant to the filing of the Dismissal of Entire Action on June 9, 2025, parties assumend this motion would be taken off calender. Plaintiff's counsel is instructed to contact Defendant/moving party to appear for discussion. David R. Krause-Leemon, Esq., counsel for Defendant appears on ZOOM. All parties agree that the entire action has been dismissed on June 9, 2025.

Discussion held, Not ARGUED.

Defendants' ASSIA STOYANOVA , AN INDIVIDUAL, BOJAN STOYANOV'S Motion For An Order Setting Aside Entry Default And Dismissing Action.

Court vacates its tentative ruling and the matter is taken off calendar pursuant to dimissal of entire action filed on June 6, 20205.

Visiting Judge: John True; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/JT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Or Vacate Dismissal
Off Calendar Apr-18-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a Motion to set aside or vacate Dismissal filed by Petitioner Hristo Gyoshev.

Dept.505: Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: D. Carter; Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 9:58 a.m. and concluding at 10:11 a.m. (D505)

Alexandra Darling, Esq. representing Plaintiff Hristop Gyoshev via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Assia Stoyanova did not appear.

Plaintiff states they were not properly notified of the 2/5/25 hearing date re: Application for Entry of Default that had no appearance.

The court takes jusiciail notice of the Case Managment Order notice genreated 12/24/24.

The court grants the motion set aside the dismissal on this matter.

The court sets a date for Applicaiton for Entry of Default Judgment for 6/25/25 at 9:00am in dept. 505.

Counsel was reminded to submit courtesy copies of all pleadings for review to this departments in box 2 days prior to the hearing.
